assumptions.text: epoch substantive gates A-H enforced mechanically per ledger; no padding
multi-sign fraction strings written in non-increasing value order (descending convention); reliability posterior Beta(8,3) mean 0.727 after the ZA8 violation
Beta(8,2) prior frozen after derivation-set census, before pipeline output; sensitivity Beta(4,1)/Beta(16,4) in seal
silver raw token character order preserves editorial reading order (lineara.xyz convention)
composite klasmatograms additive (JE=3/4) except D-composites (Schrijver); E=1/4 anchored, D unanchored
GORILA letters in Unicode glyph names identify the classes the ed.pr. will use
LM I horizon restriction controls system drift; PH/MM II quarantined to secondary tier
